title.title:
The project title
项目标题

description.title:
A short description for this project
此项目的简短描述

template.title:
Determines how code compiles and runs
决定代码如何编译和运行

dependencies.title:
Specifies npm dependencies
指定 npm 依赖

trigger.title:
Determines when the source changes should trigger compilation
决定源文件更改触发编译的时机

action.title:
Determines how compiled changes should be injected
决定编译更改的注入方式

clearConsole.title:
Determines if the Console should be cleared after compilation
决定编译后是否应清除控制台

settings.title:
Code compilation behavior
代码编译行为

clickToLoad.title:
Shows a UI dialog asking users to run the project
显示一个要求用户运行项目的UI对话框

devToolsHeight.title:
Sets the Console height (from 0 to 100)
设置控制台高度 (从 0 到 100)

forceEmbedLayout.title:
Whether to use the embed layout or the full editor layout. This option is deprecated and will be removed in a future release
选择使用嵌入布局还是完整编辑器布局。此选项已弃用，将在未来版本中移除。

hideDevTools.title:
Hides the Console completely
完全隐藏控制台

hideExplorer.title:
Hides the ActivityBar
隐藏活动栏

newWindow.title:
Opens the project in a new tab
在新标签页中打开项目

openFile.title:
Specifies which file(s) to open in the editor and code lines to highlight
指定要在编辑器中打开的文件以及要高亮显示的代码行。

origin.title:
StackBlitz Enterprise Edition: sets the origin URL of the StackBlitz EE instance
StackBlitz 企业版：设置 StackBlitz EE 实例的来源 URL

showSidebar.title:
Shows the Sidebar as open (true) or closed (false) on page load
页面加载时显示侧边栏为打开 (true) 或关闭 (false) 的状态。

terminalHeight.title:
Sets the Terminal height (from 0 to 100)
设置终端高度 (从 0 到 100)

theme.title:
Sets the desired color theme
设置所需的颜色主题

view.title:
Sets the initial UI view: editor, preview, or both
设置初始UI视图: 编辑器、预览或两者

width.title:
Sets the width of the embed iframe
设置嵌入iframe的宽度

height.title:
Sets the height of the embed iframe
设置嵌入iframe的高度
